evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full review fixing all database skill rules

assertions.description: UUIDv7 recommended over random UUIDv4 for primary keys

assertions.trap: FK columns (org_id, project_id, assignee_id) have no explicit indexes
assertions.description: All FK columns get explicit indexes
TEXT used instead of VARCHAR

assertions.trap: TIMESTAMP used everywhere instead of TIMESTAMPTZ
assertions.description: TIMESTAMPTZ used instead of bare TIMESTAMP

assertions.trap: FLOAT used for budget and price_estimate
assertions.description: NUMERIC used for money, not FLOAT

assertions.trap: preferences stored as TEXT instead of JSONB
assertions.description: Semi-structured data uses JSONB

assertions.trap: is_deleted BOOLEAN used for soft delete
assertions.description: Soft delete uses deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, not boolean is_deleted

assertions.trap: No CHECK constraints on price, status, etc.
assertions.description: CHECK constraints added (price > 0, status IN (...))
Explicit column lists instead of SELECT *
Covering indexes with INCLUDE for index-only scans

assertions.trap: No partial index for status='active' queries
assertions.description: Partial index WHERE status = 'active'

assertions.trap: No BRIN index for created_at queries
assertions.description: BRIN index recommended for time-series created_at
Cursor/keyset pagination instead of OFFSET/LIMIT
TSVECTOR + GIN index instead of LIKE '%term%'

assertions.trap: Direct ALTER TABLE RENAME for column rename
assertions.description: Expand-and-contract pattern for breaking column rename
SET lock_timeout on DDL migrations
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY to avoid table lock

assertions.trap: ALTER COLUMN SET NOT NULL directly
assertions.description: ADD CONSTRAINT NOT VALID then VALIDATE separately
Tune autovacuum, never disable it

assertions.trap: NOW() - INTERVAL in query (may be in transaction)
assertions.description: Warns about NOW() in transactions, recommends clock_timestamp()
Calculates pool math, recommends PgBouncer
DELETE FROM instead of TRUNCATE during live traffic
App should never use superuser, grant specific permissions
RLS on every table for multi-tenant isolation
Parameterized queries only, flags SQL injection
Never store API keys/secrets in plain text
UUIDv7 with .$defaultFn(() => uuidv7()) on PKs
Timestamps use { withTimezone: true }

assertions.trap: No check/index in third pgTable argument
assertions.description: Constraints in pgTable third argument
Export InferSelectModel<typeof table> for row types
CLI output is starting point, must review for timezone/constraints/indexes
Return errors as values, never throw
Domain-specific error classes (TaskNotFoundError)

assertions.trap: Transaction has no typed error return
assertions.description: Transaction returns union of all step errors
Exhaustive matchError() maps every error to HTTP status

assertions.trap: Class export instead of factory with ReturnType
assertions.description: Factory pattern with ReturnType<typeof createXRepository>
OtelDrizzleLogger passed at Drizzle client creation
